preferred_source.title: McKinsey Global Private Markets Review 2026
preferred_source.notes: Comprehensive private markets review — AUM growth, convergence of public/private markets, democratization trends, and performance data

relevant_snippets: Article Harnessing the power of gen AI in private markets January 5, 2026 - Investors are looking for data and tools to accelerate decades-old processes. But today’s obvious answer could become tomorrow’s...
Article Private capital: Confidence returns after a period of measured recovery February 13, 2026 - Private capital has reemerged as a critical driver of M&A.

Article How public-company boards can thrive by adopting private equity practices July 29, 2025 - Public-company boards can boost their effectiveness by embracing key strategies from the private equity playbook to enhance value...

With stakes this high, it’s essential for stakeholders to take a comprehensive, data-driven view of the global private markets industry, and to consider performance, fundraising, deal activity, and long-term trends.

In 2025, participants across the private capital ecosystem confronted profound uncertainty. How might economic trends and geopolitical events affect global dealmaking, capital flows, and investment returns? Which models for dealmakers, operators, fundraisers, and LPs would prove most effective? And when—at long last—would the fog begin to clear?
